customers_say: Customers find the water purifier delivers quality water that tastes great and is easy to maintain. The installation process is smooth with professional service, and customers consider it a budget-friendly option. While the appearance receives positive feedback, with one customer noting its premium matte finish, several customers report issues with water leakage from the unit.

reviews.author: Chauhan Vishal
reviews.title: One of the best RO.
reviews.body: One of the best RO i have purchased before this i was using another RO for my home. But all other RO required the service on every year and cost it around 4-9K depends. But Native say you have to service on every 2 year and warranty for the same.you can renew the contract again if you want biggest win. Water test is good. From bore we getting water around 800TDS and using this RO we get around 90-110 TDS 🤝 installation process is smooth

reviews.author: PREETAM N.
reviews.title: Marvellous-M0
reviews.body: Just a word.... "Marvellous". The purifier is first of its kind. It's look, finesse, performance, everything is perfect. I installed the one in my office. Now after few months of usage I m thinking of changing my home water purifier to the M0 from urban company.

reviews.author: varun karnati
reviews.title: Best product - budget friendly
reviews.body: Budget friendly product, low maintenance, good filtration,5 litre storage, Material strong durable body Good product

reviews.author: Balachander
reviews.title: Good machine at a reasonable price
reviews.body: Prompt delivery...The technician also came to install the machine the next day as per schedule... Started using...gives tds of around 50 after purification, which is perfect. Taste of water is good.

reviews.author: Gaurav
reviews.title: Good product, can go for it...
reviews.body: I was looking for a RO for my home and came to know about native RO on urban company app. After some research on Google and watching some youtube videos i finalized this product and waited for the Amazon sale. Now it's about an month I am using this RO and based on that I list some of its pros and cons. Pros: 1. Delivery by Amazon and installation service by UC was fantastic, no complains about that. Installation person was a thorough professional. 2. Water filtration is good. TDS meter is provided with the RO. 3. RO is sleek and can blend easily with any kitchen. 4. Unconditional warranty for
